statement: born to privilege and the duties that come with it
raised on the land and its honest, unglamorous work
cast out from home and unable to return
shaped by the underworld and the deals struck there
trained in quiet discipline behind cloister walls
forged in the ranks and the chain of command
devoted to knowledge and the questions it raises
at home in the untamed places far from any town
hardened by a lifetime of grueling work for little reward
always weighing the cost, the risk, and the profit
